data.prompt_text: Two hikers at points B and C are 379 feet apart on a flat plain. They are looking at a landmark at A. They measure \angle B = 69.5^\circ and \angle C = 31.6^\circ. What is the distance from hiker B to the landmark (distance AB)?
data.solution_steps:
\text{We are given side } a = 379 \text{, and angles } \angle B = 69.5^\circ \text{ and } \angle C = 31.6^\circ.

\text{We need to find the distance } AB \text{, which corresponds to side } c.

\text{Step 1: Find the missing angle } A.

\angle A = 180^\circ - \angle B - \angle C

\angle A = 180^\circ - 69.5^\circ - 31.6^\circ = 78.9^\circ

\text{Step 2: Set up the Law of Sines to solve for } c.

\frac{c}{\sin(C)} = \frac{a}{\sin(A)}

\frac{c}{\sin(31.6^\circ)} = \frac{379}{\sin(78.9^\circ)}

\text{Step 3: Isolate } c \text{ and evaluate.}

c = \frac{379\sin(31.6^\circ)}{\sin(78.9^\circ)}

c \approx 202.4

\text{We are given side } a = 169 \text{, and angles } \angle B = 99.9^\circ \text{ and } \angle C = 25.6^\circ.

\text{We need to find the distance } AB \text{, which corresponds to side } c.

\text{Step 1: Find the missing angle } A.

\angle A = 180^\circ - \angle B - \angle C

\angle A = 180^\circ - 99.9^\circ - 25.6^\circ = 54.5^\circ

\text{Step 2: Set up the Law of Sines to solve for } c.

\frac{c}{\sin(C)} = \frac{a}{\sin(A)}

\frac{c}{\sin(25.6^\circ)} = \frac{169}{\sin(54.5^\circ)}

\text{Step 3: Isolate } c \text{ and evaluate.}

c = \frac{169\sin(25.6^\circ)}{\sin(54.5^\circ)}

c \approx 89.7

\text{We are given side } a = 361 \text{, and angles } \angle B = 113.4^\circ \text{ and } \angle C = 17.5^\circ.

\text{We need to find the distance } AB \text{, which corresponds to side } c.

\text{Step 1: Find the missing angle } A.

\angle A = 180^\circ - \angle B - \angle C

\angle A = 180^\circ - 113.4^\circ - 17.5^\circ = 49.1^\circ

\text{Step 2: Set up the Law of Sines to solve for } c.

\frac{c}{\sin(C)} = \frac{a}{\sin(A)}

\frac{c}{\sin(17.5^\circ)} = \frac{361}{\sin(49.1^\circ)}

\text{Step 3: Isolate } c \text{ and evaluate.}

c = \frac{361\sin(17.5^\circ)}{\sin(49.1^\circ)}

c \approx 143.6
